arts.ttl: Predicted Borussia Dortmund XI vs Union Berlin
arts.sum: After their 7-1 drubbing of Celtic in midweek, Borussia Dortmund now face a tough trip to Berlin as they play Union Berlin. There will be changes from midweek as man…

arts.ttl: Liam Scales reveals the Dortmund threat that Celtic couldn't handle but that WON'T force Hoops to abandon style
arts.sum: The Hoops defender insists the champions will have NO bother raising themselves from Tuesday's nightmare in Germany

arts.ttl: Bundesliga Preview | Union Berlin vs Borussia Dortmund – BVB look to make it three wins in a row
arts.sum: Borussia Dortmund head to the capital on Saturday to take on Union Berlin as they look to pick up their third Bundesliga win in a row. The hosts are currently…

arts.ttl: Match Preview: Borussia Dortmund Visit Union Berlin with Depleted Attack
arts.sum: Across five games, no Union Berlin player has registered more than one goal involvement. For Dortmund, the game against Union Berlin presents a unique challenge in breaking down the league’s best organized defense.

arts.ttl: Rodgers won't change approach despite Dortmund humbling
arts.sum: Celtic boss Brendan Rodgers has told his critics to judge him in January insisting he will not change his approach despite their 7-1 humbling against Borussia Dortmund.

arts.ttl: Brendan Rodgers delivers remarkable response to Celtic's thrashing by Borussia Dortmund
arts.sum: Celtic saw a 17-match winning run ended in Germany in midweek as they were brutally demolished by Borussia Dortmund 7-1 at the Westfalenstadion

arts.ttl: Union Berlin vs. Borussia Dortmund: Free-scoring BVB head on the road
arts.sum: After netting 11 goals in their last two matches, Borussia Dortmund will look to produce another strong attacking display in Saturday’s meeting with Union Berlin.

arts.ttl: USA, Borussia Dortmund winger Gio Reyna has recovery setback
arts.sum: Meanwhile, Reyna's Borussia Dortmund teammate, forward Karim Adeyemi, is set to miss more than a month with a muscle injury after scoring three goals in his team's 7-1 win over Celtic. Borussia Dortmund and United States men's national team winger Gio Reyna has had a further setback to his recovery from a groin injury.

arts.ttl: Dortmund's Adeyemi to miss more than a month with injury and Reyna has recovery setback
arts.sum: Borussia Dortmund forward Karim Adeyemi is set to miss more than a month with a muscle injury after scoring three goals in his team’s 7-1 win over Celtic, and his American teammate Gio Reyna has had a further setback to his recovery from a groin injury. Sahin also said 18-year-old forward Julien Duranville, who replaced Adeyemi off the bench against Celtic, would be out for a similar amount of time with a thigh injury.

arts.ttl: Borussia Dortmund dealt triple injury blow
arts.sum: Borussia Dortmund will have to do without Karim Adeyemi, Julien Duranville and Gio Reyna for the foreseeable future. Speaking in Friday’s press conference ahead of their Bundesliga game against Union…
